title: Crimson 16x
description: This project is about a texture pack called Crimson 16x
body:
# **Description**
This is Crimson 16x, a texture pack made for RelitoPlaysCg. It is made by [TheMantikorMc](https://twitter.com/TheMantikormc). The pack consists of swords, tools, armor, blocks, and skies.

# **Features**
- 🪖 Armor
- ⚔️ Swords
- ⛏️ Tools
- 🔲 Blocks
- ☁️ Skies

# **Bedrock Version Download**
- [Crimson 16x Bedrock](https://www.mediafire.com/file/j3me5ez8nydoxbw/Crimson_16x.mcpack/file) 


# **Pack Creator**
- [TheMantikorMc](https://twitter.com/TheMantikormc)
